perspectiveMattersBody: We've invited you to share your unique insights. This guided audio experience is designed to capture your authentic voice on critical industry shifts. It's secure, straightforward, and entirely on your terms.
listenBody: Review the context and prompts provided by the editorial team at your own pace.
speakBody: Record your audio responses directly in the browser when you're ready.
reviewBody: Listen to your recording, re-record if needed, and submit securely.
microphoneAccessBody: Required to record your perspective. Browser will prompt for permission.
recordingConsentBody: I agree to allow my audio to be recorded, transcribed, and analyzed for editorial purposes.
textOnlyHint: No microphone? You'll answer by typing — secure either way.
readyToListenOrTypeBody: Use the microphone or type your message below.
mediaImagesOnly: Only image files can be attached.
intelligencePaletteBody: Adjust the tone and density of your editorial capture.
synthesizeBody: Condense the narrative into its most impactful core essence.
narrativizeBody: Expand verbal shorthand into a descriptive editorial story.
reviewEditHint: Tap the text to edit your answer.
verificationBody: We require verification to ensure the integrity of our editorial insights. Your personal data is encrypted and managed with institutional-grade security.
submitAnonymouslyBody: By enabling this, your identity will be stripped from the public audio artifact and internal editorial reports. Your perspective will be attributed to "Anonymous Contributor" while retaining its verified status.
privacyNoteBefore: Your data is processed in accordance with our
privacyNoteAfter: . We never sell your personal information to third parties.
publishConsentLabel: I consent to my perspective being recorded, transcribed, published, edited, and excerpted for editorial use.
publishConsentVersion: Editorial Consent Terms v1.0 — recorded with your submission.
verifiedStatusBody: Your perspective will be flagged as "Verified Institutional Source" in the final report.
editorialQueueBody: Once submitted, our editorial team reviews the audio for clarity before publication.
dataInsightsBody: Your contribution helps shape regional market confidence benchmarks.
thankYouBody: Your response has been securely submitted — our editorial team will take it from here.
nextReviewBody: Our team reviews your audio for clarity before publication.
creditVerifiedBody: Your perspective will be credited to you in the final report.
creditAnonymousBody: Your identity is withheld — your verified perspective is attributed anonymously.
inviteInvalidBody: We couldn't verify this invitation. Please check the link from your invite, or ask the sender for a new one.
inviteExpiredBody: This link is no longer active. Ask the sender to send you a fresh invitation.
inviteAcceptedBody: Your perspective has already been submitted from this link. There's nothing more to do here.
initFailed: We couldn't start the interview. Please try again.
listeningContinuous: Listening — just start speaking, or type below.
micMuted: Microphone muted — tap to resume, or type below.
refineFailed: Couldn't refine that answer. Please try again.
submitFailed: We couldn't submit your perspective. Please try again.
submitExpired: This session has expired and can no longer be submitted.
